entities.name: Printing Press Parallel
entities.context: Framework comparing current information technology revolution to Renaissance-era printing press impact

entities.name: Renaissance
entities.context: Historical period cited as parallel to current moment due to printing press enabling knowledge transfer

entities.name: printing press
entities.context: Historical technology that enabled high-density information transfer between intelligent people

entities.name: information transmission costs
entities.context: Key variable in the framework - collapsing costs enable new intellectual work modes

entities.name: specialized knowledge
entities.context: Its value has decreased because holding knowledge is less valuable when transmission is cheap

relationships.context: Framework draws direct analogy between current moment and Renaissance period
Uses printing press as the historical analog to current information technology
Printing press enabled the Renaissance's proliferation of technology and culture
Cheap transmission decreases value of holding specialized knowledge
Collapsing transmission costs are the core mechanism of the parallel
